para_trans: Group-C cadre posts at the establishment.
regarding the amendment of the Entry into Service Rules.
Department of Social Justice and Special Assistance
Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk,
Superintendent of the Group-C cadre office at the establishment of the Commissioner, Social Welfare, Pune,
Principal Clerk, Senior Clerk, Home Guard, Senior Social Welfare Inspector, Social Welfare Inspector or
In the notification accompanying Article 309 of the Constitution amending the Rules of Entry into Service of Posts
The government is prescribing as indicated (English and Marathi).
(2) The aforesaid notification shall be published separately in the Extraordinary Gazette of the Government of Maharashtra.
3. This Government Decision is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
